results.rendered_html: dvaidhībhū (dvaidha + 1. bhū), ˚bhavati in zwei Theile auseinander gehen; in Zwiespalt gerathen: ekaikastu dvidhā chinno dvaidhībhavati  HARIV. 8530 . (vāhinī) dvaidhībhūtā mahārāja gaṅgevāsādya parvatam  MBH. 7,1331 . kṛtyayorbhinnadeśatvāddvaidhībhavati me manaḥ  ŚĀK. 50 . dvaidhībhūteṣu lokeṣu  MBH. 5,4300 . ˚bhūtaṃ mano me 'dya tava caiva prapaśyataḥ 4,1955 . 7,1229 .

results.rendered_html:
dvaidhībhū 1 P.
1 To become divided into two parts, be disunited.
2 To vacillate, be divided or uncertain, be in suspense (as mind); kṛtyayorbhinnadeśaṃtvād dvaidhībhavati me manaḥ  Ś. 2. 17.  s
